zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis於1095年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾布雷孔時，他的父親Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon51歲，母親Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr50歲。他於1110年與Gwenllian verch Philip在威爾士結婚。他們至少是10個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1165年在威爾士布洛可爾哈維福德維斯特 聖 瑪麗享年71歲，埋葬在威爾士布雷康史爾布雷孔。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis于1095年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾布雷孔时，他的父亲Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon51岁，母亲Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr50岁。他于1110年与Gwenllian verch Philip在威尔士结婚。他们至少是10个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1165年在威尔士布洛可爾哈維福德維斯特 聖 瑪麗享年71岁，埋葬在威尔士布雷康史爾布雷孔。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Gwgon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: variant of   Gagen   or   Geoghegan  .

variants.name: Gagen
meanings: 1 Germanic: short form of various compound names formed with hag ‘stockade, enclosure’.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis was born in 1095, in Brecon, Breconshire, Wales, his father, Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon, was 51 and his mother, Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr, was 50. He married Gwenllian verch Philip in 1110, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 10 sons. He died about 1165, in Haverfordwest St Mary, Pembrokeshire, Wales, at the age of 71, and was buried in Brecon, Breconshire, Wales.

fr.Glyntawe, Defynnog, Breconshire, Wales: Glyntawe, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis est né en 1095, à Brecon, Breconshire, Galles, son père, Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Gwenllian verch Philip en 1110, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils. Il est décédé environ 1165, à Haverfordwest St Mary, Pembrokeshire, Galles, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Brecon, Breconshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis 1095 in Brecon, Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon 51 und seine Mutter Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr 50. Er hat 1110 in Wales Gwenllian verch Philip geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne. Er starb um 1165 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Haverfordwest St Mary, Pembrokeshire, Wales und wurde in Brecon, Breconshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis è nato il nel 1095 nel Brecon, Breconshire, Galles, il suo padre, Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Gwenllian verch Philip nel 1110, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli. Morì circa 1165, nel Haverfordwest St Mary, Pembrokeshire, Galles, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Brecon, Breconshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wisが1095年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアブレコンで生まれた時，父Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Breconは51歳，母Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawrは50歳であった。1110年にウェールズでGwenllian verch Philipと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子の親であった。彼は約1165年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアヘイバーフォードウエスト スト マリーで71歳で死去し，ウェールズブレコンシュアイアブレコンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis(이)가 1095년 웨일스 브레콘실르 브레콘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr(은)는 50세였다. 그는 1110년 웨일스에서 Gwenllian verch Philip(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1165년 웨일스 p브로케실르 하버퍼드베스트 스트 메리에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 브레콘실르 브레콘에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis nasceu em 1095, em Brecon, Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian verch Philip em 1110, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1165, em Haverfordwest St Mary, Pembrokeshire, Gales, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Brecon, Breconshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis родился в 1095 г. в местности брекон, брекуншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian verch Philip в 1110 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей. Он умер около 1165 г. в местности хавирфордвест ст мэри, пемброкешир, Уэльс в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности брекон, брекуншир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis nació en 1095, en Brecon, Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Bleddyn ap Maenyrch King of Brecon, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Elen Ferch Tewdwr Mawr, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Gwenllian verch Philip en 1110, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1165, en Haverfordwest St Mary, Pembrokeshire, Gales, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Brecon, Breconshire, Gales.
